race.comment: LEAVING LAS VEGAS (1) drifted back from his wide draw last start then hit the line hard to score by a head at this track over 1435m. Rates highly and should go well again. POWER TO RULE (12) finished 5 lengths adrift in seventh last time at this track in a disappointing performance. Likely improver with strong prospects. SEMPRE (3) recorded his first win last start over 1300m at this track, getting home by 0.9 lengths. Tougher task this time but expected to be competitive again. THE TOP BAR (2) finished third two runs back at this track then improved last time out to score by 2.5 lengths over 1200m at this track. Finds a suitable race and can make it two in succession. SCHUHBECK (10) is racing in top order and can't be left out of calculations.
